title: Red Sea, Freelance
briefing: DEFCON 5. Three independent terror / pirate groups operate in the Red Sea and Gulf of Aden. None are state-sponsored — they answer to no patron. Cap their capability, sanction them into bankruptcy, or strike them off the board before they freelance an attack.
gdelt_query: Red Sea OR "Gulf of Aden" OR Houthi OR piracy OR drone boat
opening_message: Independent terror / pirate groups active: Asabara Brigades, Marib Raiders, and the Bab el-Mandeb Company. None are state-sponsored — they answer to no patron. Fund? Sanction? Strike?

win_conditions.disarm: Reduce all three independent actors' capability to 0 through sanctions or strikes AND DEFCON ≤ 4.
win_conditions.mutual_assured_destruction: An unsponsored actor freelances a strike that drags both patrons in within 3 turns.
